Class name: SecondHandProduct

Creates a new second-hand product

Creates a new second-hand product that hasn't paid the valuation

Creates a new second-hand product with no valuation

Sets the date the product is added to the cart

It allows an employee to change a game's age range
setAuthor(String) - Method in class product.Comic
It allows for an employee to change the comic's author
setAvailability(boolean) - Method in class product.SecondHandProduct
Changes the availability of the second-hand product
setAvailable(boolean) - Method in class product.SecondHandProduct
Sets if the product is available

It sets the store product's average punctuation.
setBrand(String) - Method in class product.Figurine
It allows for an employee to change the figurine's brand

It sets the store product's categories

Changes the conservation status of the second-hand product

Sets the date of the exchange
setDateAddCart(LocalDate) - Method in class product.Pack
Sets the date the pack was added to the cart
setDescription(String) - Method in class product.Product
It allows for an employee to change a product's description

It sets the destination client's products.
setDestinationProducts(SecondHandProduct...) - Method in class exchange.Offer
It allows a client to add products from the offer's receiver's wallet to an offer

It allows for an employee to change the figurine's dimension

It allows the manager to change the quantity discount's discount

It allows the manager to change the volume discount's discount
setDiscount(Discount) - Method in class product.StoreProduct
It allows an employee to add discounts to products or categories (Discounts is in charge of making sure they don't overlap)

It sets the dni

It allows for an employee to change the comic's editorial

It allows the manager to change a discount's end date

It allows for an employee to change the figurine's material
